note: Fearful, broadly declining tape with EXTREME FEAR (Fear & Greed 18 <= 20). Two de-risk forces stack: the risk_off exposure multiplier (0.15) AND the sentiment gate (factor 0.6) at the capitulation extreme. Attention is fear chatter, not a rotation. Cut to a near-full USDT reserve, hold one resilient leader tiny, and place a heartbeat trade to satisfy the daily-trade requirement while protective exits run.

computed.regime_reason: breadth_pct 31 <= 40 AND fear_greed 18 <= 30 AND median_24h_return -3.6 < -2 -> risk_off (broad decline; attention is fear chatter)
computed.sentiment_gate_reason: fear_greed 18 <= 20 -> EXTREME FEAR (capitulation), attention tilt haircut by 0.6
computed.risk_budget_reason: (100 - target_stable_reserve 12) * 0.15 = 13.2; trending climbs here are capitulation/dead-cat chatter (the gate haircuts the tilt), so the book is a near-full USDT reserve with one tiny resilient-leader heartbeat starter.

sentiment_scores.components: most resilient large-cap, trending #1, but volume only 1.4 (near) and tilt haircut by the extreme-fear gate -> below entry bar
loud capitulation-bounce chatter, but extreme-fear gate + security penalty 0.40 crush it -> faded
weak trending move, flat social, gate-haircut

computed.attention_reason: In extreme-fear risk_off, trending climbs are capitulation / dead-cat chatter, not a rotation. The sentiment gate haircuts every attention tilt by 0.6 and no name clears 0.65. The Skill holds a near-full USDT reserve; a single tiny BTCB heartbeat trade keeps the agent daily-trade compliant while protective exits run.

entry: Do not initiate attention entries in risk_off / extreme-fear (capitulation chatter); hold the USDT reserve.
If a daily heartbeat trade is required, place the smallest compliant clip in the single most resilient large-cap (highest sentiment_score) and bring exposure back to the reserve.
Per-name weight capped at 17%; min_stable_reserve floor 10% always honoured; the sentiment gate caps exposure at extremes.
exit: Exit any inherited attention position whose sentiment_score < 0.50 or whose volume_ratio has dropped below 1.0.
Force-exit at stop_loss 12% or take_profit 22%; on the risk_off / extreme-fear transition rotate all risk into USDT.
Stay flat until breadth, momentum and Fear & Greed recover out of the extreme into risk_on/breakout.

actions.reason: risk_off transition + sentiment_score 0.37 < 0.50 -> rotate to USDT
no volume surge, fear chatter -> rotate to USDT
sentiment_score 0.30 < 0.65: capitulation-bounce hype crushed by the extreme-fear gate + security penalty
smallest compliant daily-trade clip in the most resilient large-cap; satisfies min_trades_per_day 1 without taking real attention risk
